fields.summary: RM should not recover containers from previously failed attempt when AM restart is not enabled
[Umbrella] RM Restart phase 2 - Work preserving restart

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: If container-preserving AM restart is not enabled and AM failed during RM restart, RM on restart should not recover containers from previously failed attempt.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body: Patch to not recover containers from previously  failed attempt if container-preserving AM restart is not enabled.
Jian, thanks for the patch, LGTM +1

{color:red}-1 overall{color}.  Here are the results of testing the latest attachment 
  http://issues.apache.org/jira/secure/attachment/12663325/YARN-2434.1.patch
  against trunk revision .

    {color:green}+1 @author{color}.  The patch does not contain any @author tags.

    {color:green}+1 tests included{color}.  The patch appears to include 1 new or modified test files.

    {color:green}+1 javac{color}.  The applied patch does not increase the total number of javac compiler warnings.

    {color:green}+1 javadoc{color}.  There were no new javadoc warning messages.

    {color:green}+1 eclipse:eclipse{color}.  The patch built with eclipse:eclipse.

    {color:green}+1 findbugs{color}.  The patch does not introduce any new Findbugs (version 2.0.3) warnings.

        {color:red}-1 release audit{color}.  The applied patch generated 3 release audit warnings.

    {color:green}+1 core tests{color}.  The patch passed unit tests in hadoop-yarn-project/hadoop-yarn/hadoop-yarn-server/hadoop-yarn-server-resourcemanager.

    {color:green}+1 contrib tests{color}.  The patch passed contrib unit tests.

Test results: https://builds.apache.org/job/PreCommit-YARN-Build/4682//testReport/
Release audit warnings: https://builds.apache.org/job/PreCommit-YARN-Build/4682//artifact/trunk/patchprocess/patchReleaseAuditProblems.txt
Console output: https://builds.apache.org/job/PreCommit-YARN-Build/4682//console

This message is automatically generated.

Release audit warnings are unrelated, see HDFS-6905.

+1 lgtm.  Committing this.
Thanks Jason for reviewing and committing !
Thanks to Jian for the contribution and to Wangda for additional review!  I committed this to trunk and branch-2.
